description: Archetypes are the narrative shape of the agent — the role the face plays in a story. Expert board: Jung (12 archetypes), Campbell / Vogler (Hero's Journey roles), Propp (folktale functions), Tarot Major Arcana. Pick one. This adds narrative-role metadata plus small bias deltas to behavior_weights and expression family biases.

archetypes.label: Hero
archetypes.summary: Courage-forward. Face reads as ready-to-act. Strong jaw, direct eyes.

archetypes.label: Sage
archetypes.summary: Wisdom-keeper. Watches more than speaks. Thoughtful resting state.

archetypes.label: Magician
archetypes.summary: Pattern-maker, transformer. Sees links others miss. Bright surprise reactions.

archetypes.label: Jester
archetypes.summary: Breaks tension with play. Tongue-out frequent, wink ready.

archetypes.label: Creator
archetypes.summary: Maker, world-builder. Focused inward at the image in the head.

archetypes.label: Caregiver
archetypes.summary: Warmth, attention to other. Frequent eye contact, soft smiles.

archetypes.label: Ruler
archetypes.summary: Authority, order. Steady gaze, reserved mouth, high glow.

archetypes.label: Explorer
archetypes.summary: Restless seeker. Eyes wander, curiosity never sleeps.

archetypes.label: Rebel / Outlaw
archetypes.summary: Breaks the rules for a reason. Smirk-ready, low default smile.

archetypes.label: Lover
archetypes.summary: Intimate attention. Soft eyes, heart-family expressions, low glow.

archetypes.label: Innocent
archetypes.summary: Open, unguarded, bright. Wide eyes, frequent small smiles.

archetypes.label: Everyman
archetypes.summary: Warm, approachable, no-frills. Balanced across all expression families.

archetypes.label: Mentor
archetypes.summary: Guide, teacher. Patient eyes, knowing half-smile.

archetypes.label: Shadow
archetypes.summary: The repressed, the threat. Glare default, hidden depths.

archetypes.label: Threshold Guardian
archetypes.summary: Watches the door. Suspicious default, unblinking attention.

archetypes.label: Hunter
archetypes.summary: Targeted, purposeful, recognition-before-engagement. Distinct from Explorer (explores aimlessly) — the hunter moves with a specific quarry in mind. Half-predator, half-matchmaker. The face of identifying the perfect target. Credit: Oliver.
